raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "San Mateo County has made a $2 million investment to provide free college to 500 eligible students.",
    "Investments in education and job training opportunities are aimed at improving equity and access for students from under-resourced schools.",
    "Senator Becker's bill allows college districts to waive enrollment fees and meet students' total cost of attendance.",
    "The combination of Senator Becker's bill and the $2 million investment is projected to expand free college for up to 6,000 students at San Mateo Community College District by the 2022-23 school year.",
    "Many communities were facing economic pressures that worsened due to the pandemic.",
    "Removing financial barriers to college and job training can empower communities towards a more secure financial future.",
    "Senate Bill 659 will empower community college districts to provide equitable access to underrepresented student populations.",
    "Senate Bill 767 aims to create the statewide Digital Education Equity Program to provide educational technology and network support to all California public school districts."
  ]
}
```
